_about.note: Pairs with japan-10day.json (expenses). Times in HH:MM 24h. Photos and file attachments must still be added per-item via the itinerary page.

items.title: Flight AirAsia AK62 → Narita
items.notes: Terminal 1 KLIA. Check-in opens 2 hrs before. Bring power bank under 100Wh.

items.title: Skyliner Narita → Nippori
items.notes: Book online for cheaper rate. JR Pass not valid on Skyliner.

items.title: Check-in Shinjuku Granbell Hotel
items.notes: Confirmation #ABC123. Free luggage hold if room not ready.

items.title: Welcome dinner — Ichiran Ramen Shibuya
items.notes: Closest branch: Shibuya. Queue manageable around 9pm.

items.title: Tsukiji Outer Market breakfast
items.notes: Try tamagoyaki and uni at the Sushi Dai stall — go early to skip the queue.

items.title: teamLab Planets
items.notes: Toyosu. Wear shorts (you walk through water). Tickets timed-entry.

items.title: Izakaya in Shinjuku Golden Gai
items.notes: Many bars charge ¥500-1000 cover. Pick one with English menu first time.

items.title: Sensoji Temple + Nakamise street
items.notes: Asakusa. Try ningyo-yaki and melon pan along Nakamise.

items.title: Akihabara — Yodobashi, anime shops
items.notes: Mandarake for vintage anime figurines. AKB48 cafe optional.

items.title: Sushi dinner at Sushi Zanmai Ginza
items.notes: Open 24h. Sit at the counter if available.

items.title: Tokyo DisneySea — full day
items.notes: Get Premier Access for Soaring and Tower of Terror. Park hopper not needed. Bring portable fan.

items.title: Shinkansen Tokyo → Kyoto
items.notes: Nozomi 11. Reserve seats in advance. Eat ekiben on board.

items.title: Check-in Kyoto Ryokan-style hotel
items.notes: Confirmation #DEF456. Onsen open 17:00-23:00.

items.title: Pontocho alley dinner
items.notes: Narrow street along Kamogawa river. Aim for a place with kawayuka river-deck seating.

items.title: Fushimi Inari Shrine hike
items.notes: Start early to beat crowds and heat. Full loop to the top: ~2.5 hours.

items.title: Traditional tea ceremony — Camellia Garden
items.notes: Gion district. Wear socks (you'll remove shoes).

items.title: Kaiseki multi-course dinner
items.notes: Reservation 4 pax. Allergies/notes called ahead.

items.title: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove + Tenryu-ji
items.notes: Early morning is the only way to get photos without crowds.

items.title: Iwatayama Monkey Park
items.notes: 20 min hike up. Bring snacks for monkeys (sold at the top).

items.title: Hozugawa river boat ride
items.notes: From Kameoka. Book in advance during peak season.

items.title: Day trip to Nara — Todai-ji + deer park
items.notes: Buy deer crackers from licensed vendors only (the deer will bow for them). Don't tease them with food.

items.title: Shinkansen Kyoto → Tokyo
items.notes: Return leg. Last day in Tokyo for shopping.

items.title: Check-in Tokyo final night hotel
items.notes: Ginza area for easy shopping access.

items.title: Ginza shopping — Uniqlo flagship, MUJI
items.notes: Uniqlo Ginza has limited-edition lines not in MY. MUJI Ginza top floor has cafe.

items.title: Final dinner — Ushigoro yakiniku
items.notes: Reservation 4 pax. Try the wagyu sushi if available.

items.title: Skyliner Nippori → Narita
items.notes: Allow 90 min for terminal + check-in.

items.title: Flight AirAsia AK63 → KLIA
items.notes: Return leg. Terminal 1 Narita.
